construct: Applies engineering principles and uses a wide range of tools and techniques to design and make a product that addresses a real-life problem.

elementsOfConstruct.description: Utilises various materials and techniques to produce items while adhering to safety procedures

subSkills.label: Utilises materials, processes and safety measures to make products for real-life problems

elementsOfConstruct.description: Generates and develops graphical representations and models

subSkills.label: Interprets/generates ideas in drawing/sketch/graphic form; creativity in Design Process
Analyses, designs and constructs innovative systems anchored on System Technology

elementsOfConstruct.description: Develops and implements a business idea

subSkills.label: Entrepreneurship education and cross-cutting issues in design/make projects

components.structureNotes: SBA Form 2 tests 10/45 + shared portfolio/artefact project across Form 2-3 (110 marks).
SBA Form 3 tests 13/45 + project. Portfolio A3 + artefact realisation.
Final Exam 6 items/100. Duration 2h45. Candidates must attempt SBA+FE.

rules: SBA: portfolio + artefact project guided by ECZ theme.

exemplars.scenarioTheme: Real-life design brief requiring sketches/graphics and design-process creativity
